name: ARB Bot
description: Validates architecture solution design documents against enterprise policies and generates Infrastructure-as-Code (Terraform) scripts.
copyright: Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.

endpoints.name: default
endpoints.description: Default endpoint for the ARB Bot skill

validateArchitectureDocument.description: Validate an architecture document (PDF or DOCX) against enterprise policies. Returns findings including violations, deviations, suggestions, and missing items.
validateArchitectureDocument.name: validateArchitectureDocument

generateInfrastructureAsCode.description: Generate starter Terraform IaC scripts from an architecture document (PDF or DOCX).
generateInfrastructureAsCode.name: generateInfrastructureAsCode

file_base64.description: Base64-encoded content of the PDF or DOCX file.

findings.description: JSON-serialized array of finding objects with Type, Issue, Description, Principles, Mandatory, and Category fields.

scripts.description: JSON-serialized array of Terraform script strings.
